---
id: authorization-role-assignments-controller-list-role-assignments-for-resource-by-external-id
title: "List role assignments for a resource by external ID"
description: "List all role assignments granted on a resource, identified by its external ID. Each assignment includes the organization membership it was granted to."
sidebar_label: "List role assignments for a resource by external ID"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List role assignments for a resource by external ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/authorization/organizations/{organization_id}/resources/{resource_type_slug}/{external_id}/role_assignments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all role assignments granted on a resource, identified by its external ID. Each assignment includes the organization membership it was granted to.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
